projectDescription: A computer vision project that uses TensorFlow and SSD MobileNet v1 to detect vehicle license plates in images, videos, and live webcam feeds.
keyFeatures: License plate detection in static images using TensorFlow frozen inference graph
Real-time license plate detection on video files frame by frame
Live webcam feed detection at 1280×720 resolution
SSD MobileNet v1 feature extractor with 300×300 input resolution
Tkinter-based graphical interface for selecting detection mode and input path
Configurable confidence score thresholds per detection mode
Bounding box visualization with class labels and scores via TensorFlow Object Detection API
